backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Customer and Transaction types with CRUD operations, balance tracking, and a lemon business summary query. Supports adding/deleting customers, recording transactions with credit calculations, and retrieving filtered data.
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module that defines an empty Actor type and a no-op `run` function returning the old actor unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'Add Customer' fix (AddCustomerModal, useQueries, HomePage) to test REQ-1 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose, key changes, and translation/bigint formatting behavior.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Lemon Business Billing App' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes (home, customer detail, bill summary, my summary) wrapped in LanguageProvider and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AddCustomerModal: Dialog modal for adding a new customer with name and phone inputs; checks actor readiness before submitting, disables inputs during pending state, and resets form on cancel or successful submission.
frontend/src/components/BillLayout.tsx: Printable bill card component that displays customer info, transaction details, and balance summary, formatting all bigint monetary values to two decimal places using a `fmt()` helper.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDashboar: Displays a customer's profile card showing their name, phone number, credit balance, and account creation date with color-coded balance status.
frontend/src/components/CustomerListItem: Renders a single customer row in a list with avatar, name, phone, last transaction date, and balance, linking to the customer detail page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo, back navigation, language picker, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/SummaryBanner.ts: Shows a three-card summary grid displaying total customer count, total lemons sold, and total credit due across all customers.
frontend/src/components/TransactionEntry: Form for adding a new lemon transaction, accepting date, quantity, rate, and payment fields, then submitting to the backend and navigating to the bill view.
frontend/src/components/TransactionListI: Displays a single transaction row with expandable details, a bill navigation button, and a delete action with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context that manages the active UI language (en/hi/mr/kn), persists it to localStorage, and exposes a translation lookup function `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including CRUD operations for customers, transactions, and lemon summary data.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransactionCalcula: A memoized hook that computes total transaction amount and net credit balance from quantity, rate, previous credit, and today's payment inputs.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains UI string translations for English, Hindi, Marathi, and Kannada languages covering all app pages and components.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a lemon-themed design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, Tailwind directives, and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BillSummaryView.tsx: Page component that displays a printable bill for a specific transaction, with buttons to print or share via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Page component showing a customer's dashboard, balance, transaction history, and controls to add transactions or delete the customer.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a summary banner, customer list, and a button to open the AddCustomerModal; fetches all customers and lemon summary data, refetching both when the modal closes.
frontend/src/pages/MySummaryPage.tsx: Summary analytics page showing metric cards for total customers, lemons sold, rupees collected, credit due, and profit/loss using data from the lemon summary and customers queries.
frontend/src/utils/formatBillText.ts: Utility function that formats a customer transaction into a WhatsApp-ready bill text string, supporting multiple languages via the translations map.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom lemon-brand colors, fonts, border radii, shadows, and animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, and existing feature requests; currently flags a bug where customer addition on the Home tab is not working.
